Petition To Compel Account; For Removal Of Trustee For Breach Of Trust; To Appoint Private Professional Fiduciary As Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Feb-10-2020 Continued To Mar-09-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Howard Slavitt for Harry Sweet, (Respondent/Trustee)

Mr. Slavitt stated that parties have reached an agreement in principle on Thursday, that he is waiting to hear back, that he thinks it is settled, and if it doesn't settle there will be an ex parte to remove Mr. Sweet as Trustee, that they provided an accounting for 7 years as agreed, that they gave copies of all cancelled checks, that this is a complex matter, that he did not receive any objection to the accounting, that the trust had $5-7 million depending who you talk to, that the trust paid for mediation, that there is $310,000 in cash left, that Mr. Sweet is 50% beneficiary, that Mr. Sweet's sister, Margo, was the other 50% beneficiary who died 2 weeks before mediation, that part of settlement is no trust contest may be filed for 120 days, and requested to set hearing after May 21, 2020.

The Petition to Compel Account; etc. is continued to March 09, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Joint status report to be filed by March 02, 2020.

Judge: Joeseph M. Quinn. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Matter not reported.

Petition To Compel Account; For Removal Of Trustee For Breach Of Trust; To Appoint Private Professional Fiduciary As Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Dec-02-2019 Continued To Feb-10-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kendal Fletcher for Anne Lassahn (Petitioner).
Howard Slavitt for Harry Sweet (Trustee).

Ms. Fletcher stated that the accounting was produced at the end of August, that she received the bank statements and that they agreed to attend mediation with Judge Gallagher at JAMS. Mr. Sweet spoke of a dispute regarding ownership of a property and stated that they are working to have a meaningful ADR. The Petition to Compel Account, etc. is continued to February 10, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the status of mediation by January 30, 2020.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
